prices.source_phrase: A variety of discounts on admission are available, including, but not limited to, EBT, WIC, and ConnectorCare recipients; military and veterans; and students, faculty, and staff at Institutional Partner schools.
prices.source_block:
Are there any discounts available on admission tickets?

Members visit free year-round. Admission is free for select holidays and events .

A variety of discounts on admission are available, including, but not limited to, EBT, WIC, and ConnectorCare recipients; military and veterans; and students, faculty, and staff at Institutional Partner schools. View all discounts .

reservation.source_phrase: Entry to the Arms and Armor Galleries is included with your General Admission ticket. Timed-entry reservations are no longer required.
reservation.source_block:
General Admission

Entry to the Arms and Armor Galleries is included with your General Admission ticket. Timed-entry reservations are no longer required.

Questions about the Arms and Armor Galleries? Read our FAQ .

The Museum is open with free admission for select holidays and events . Learn more .

The Museum is closed on New Year’s Day, Easter Sunday, Independence Day, Thanksgiving, and Christmas.
